channel.title: Pebble on Neil Hanlon
channel.description: Recent content in Pebble on Neil Hanlon

item.title: I Put My Son in a Swamp
item.description:
My son is a typed resource now. He has a sync method that pulls the last seven days of his life into a versioned snapshot, a stack of reports that summarize how he slept and ate, and — I did think about this — a delete that’s careful to be idempotent, because deleting the same diaper twice shouldn’t be an error.

I did not set out to put a baby in a swamp. It followed, the way these things do, from having already put everything else in one.
